episode_title: KT #767 - ARI SHAFFIR - LUIS J GOMEZ - PEYTON RUDDY

bits.premise: Autoerotic choking can be mislabeled as the cinnamon challenge.
Uncertain porn scale can imply accidental illegal porn.
Porn denial implies innocence or lying.
Porn creates unrealistic lesbian beauty standards.
Jewish lesbian identity creates a double-slur pun.
Buying dinner for twelve men seems godlike under Jewish stereotypes.
